v.CNV: 神赐福给挪亚和他的儿子，对他们说：“你们要繁殖增多，充满大地。
v.ESV: And God blessed Noah and his sons and said to them, “Be fruitful and multiply and fill the earth.
v.GAE: 하나님이 노아와 그 아들들에게 복을 주시며 그들에게 이르시되 생육하고 번성하여 땅에 충만하라
v.KJV: And God blessed Noah and his sons, and said unto them, Be fruitful, and multiply, and replenish the earth.
v.NASB: And God blessed Noah and his sons and said to them, 'Be fruitful and multiply, and fill the earth.
v.NIV: Then God blessed Noah and his sons, saying to them, “Be fruitful and increase in number and fill the earth.
v.NRSV: God blessed Noah and his sons, and said to them, “Be fruitful and multiply, and fill the earth.
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 노아와 그의 아들들에게 복을 주시며 말씀하셨다. "생육하고 번성하여 땅에 충만하여라.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 노아와 그의 아들들에게 복을 주시며 말씀하셨습니다. “자녀를 많이 낳고 번성해 땅에 가득하라.

v.CNV: 地上各样的走兽，空中各样的飞鸟，甚至地上各样爬行的动物，和海里各样的鱼类，都要对你们惊恐惧怕；这一切都已经交在你们手里了。
v.ESV: The fear of you and the dread of you shall be upon every beast of the earth and upon every bird of the heavens, upon everything that creeps on the ground and all the fish of the sea. Into your hand they are delivered.
v.GAE: 땅의 모든 짐승과 공중의 모든 새와 땅에 기는 모든 것과 바다의 모든 물고기가 너희를 두려워하며 너희를 무서워하리니 이것들은 너희의 손에 붙였음이니라
v.KJV: And the fear of you and the dread of you shall be upon every beast of the earth, and upon every fowl of the air, upon all that moveth upon the earth, and upon all the fishes of the sea; into your hand are they delivered.
v.NASB: 'The fear of you and the terror of you will be on every beast of the earth and on every bird of the sky; with everything that creeps on the ground, and all the fish of the sea, into your hand they are given.
v.NIV: The fear and dread of you will fall on all the beasts of the earth, and on all the birds in the sky, on every creature that moves along the ground, and on all the fish in the sea; they are given into your hands.
v.NRSV: The fear and dread of you shall rest on every animal of the earth, and on every bird of the air, on everything that creeps on the ground, and on all the fish of the sea; into your hand they are delivered.
v.SAENEW: 땅에 사는 모든 짐승과, 공중에 나는 모든 새와, 땅 위를 기어다니는 모든 것과, 바다에 사는 모든 물고기가, 너희를 두려워하며, 너희를 무서워할 것이다. 내가 이것들을 다 너희 손에 맡긴다.
v.WLB: 땅의 모든 짐승들과 공중의 모든 새들과 땅에 기는 모든 것들과 바다의 모든 물고기들이 너희를 두려워하고 무서워할 것이다. 이것들을 너희 손에 준다.

v.CNV: 所有活着的动物都可以作你们的食物，我把这一切都赐给你们，好像我把青菜赐给了你们一样。
v.ESV: Every moving thing that lives shall be food for you. And as I gave you the green plants, I give you everything.
v.GAE: 모든 산 동물은 너희의 먹을 것이 될지라 채소 같이 내가 이것을 다 너희에게 주노라
v.KJV: Every moving thing that liveth shall be meat for you; even as the green herb have I given you all things.
v.NASB: 'Every moving thing that is alive shall be food for you; I give all to you, as I gave the green plant.
v.NIV: Everything that lives and moves about will be food for you. Just as I gave you the green plants, I now give you everything.
v.NRSV: Every moving thing that lives shall be food for you; and just as I gave you the green plants, I give you everything.
v.SAENEW: 살아 움직이는 모든 것이 너희의 먹거리가 될 것이다. 내가 전에 푸른 채소를 너희에게 먹거리로 준 것 같이, 내가 이것들도 다 너희에게 준다.
v.WLB: 살아 있어 움직이는 모든 것들이 너희의 양식이 될 것이다. 푸른 채소와 같이 이 모든 것을 너희에게 주었다.

v.CNV: 唯独带着生命的肉，就是带着血的肉，你们却不可吃。
v.ESV: But you shall not eat flesh with its life, that is, its blood.
v.GAE: 그러나 고기를 그 생명 되는 피째 먹지 말 것이니라
v.KJV: But flesh with the life thereof, which is the blood thereof, shall ye not eat.
v.NASB: 'Only you shall not eat flesh with its life, that is, its blood.
v.NIV: “But you must not eat meat that has its lifeblood still in it.
v.NRSV: Only, you shall not eat flesh with its life, that is, its blood.
v.SAENEW: 그러나 고기를 먹을 때에, 피가 있는 채로 먹지는 말아라. 피에는 생명이 있다.
v.WLB: 그러나 고기를 피가 있는 채로 먹어서는 안 된다. 피에는 생명이 있다.

v.CNV: 流你们的血、害你们生命的，我必向他们追偿；无论是走兽或人类，甚至各人自己的兄弟，我必要他偿命。
v.ESV: And for your lifeblood I will require a reckoning: from every beast I will require it and from man. From his fellow man I will require a reckoning for the life of man.
v.GAE: 내가 반드시 너희의 피 곧 너희의 생명의 피를 찾으리니 짐승이면 그 짐승에게서, 사람이나 사람의 형제면 그에게서 그의 생명을 찾으리라
v.KJV: And surely your blood of your lives will I require; at the hand of every beast will I require it, and at the hand of man; at the hand of every man’s brother will I require the life of man.
v.NASB: 'Surely I will require your lifeblood; from every beast I will require it. And from every man, from every man's brother I will require the life of man.
v.NIV: And for your lifeblood I will surely demand an accounting. I will demand an accounting from every animal. And from each human being, too, I will demand an accounting for the life of another human being.
v.NRSV: For your own lifeblood I will surely require a reckoning: from every animal I will require it and from human beings, each one for the blood of another, I will require a reckoning for human life.
v.SAENEW: 생명이 있는 피를 흘리게 하는 자는, 내가 반드시 보복하겠다. 그것이 짐승이면, 어떤 짐승이든지, 그것에게도 보복하겠다. 사람이 같은 사람의 피를 흘리게 하면, 그에게도 보복하겠다.
v.WLB: 너희가 생명의 피를 흘리면 반드시 값을 치를것이다. 그것이 짐승이면 그 짐승에게 그 피에 대해 값을 치를 것이며 사람이 같은 사람의 피를 흘리게 하면 그 사람에게도 그 피에 대해 값을 치를 것이다.

v.CNV: 流人血的，人也必流他的血；因为　神造人，是按着他自己的形象。
v.ESV: “Whoever sheds the blood of man, by man shall his blood be shed, for God made man in his own image.
v.GAE: 다른 사람의 피를 흘리면 그 사람의 피도 흘릴 것이니 이는 하나님이 자기 형상대로 사람을 지으셨음이니라
v.KJV: Whoso sheddeth man’s blood, by man shall his blood be shed: for in the image of God made he man.
v.NASB: 'Whoever sheds man's blood, By man his blood shall be shed, For in the image of God He made man.
v.NIV: “Whoever sheds human blood, by humans shall their blood be shed; for in the image of God has God made mankind.
v.NRSV: Whoever sheds the blood of a human, by a human shall that person’s blood be shed; for in his own image God made humankind.
v.SAENEW: 사람은 하나님의 형상대로 지음을 받았으니, 누구든지 사람을 죽인 자는 죽임을 당할 것이다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서 자기의 형상대로 사람을 만드셨기 때문에 누구든지 사람의 피를 흘리면 사람에게 피 흘림을 당할 것이다.

v.CNV: 你们要繁殖增多；要在地上滋生、增多。”
v.ESV: And you, be fruitful and multiply, increase greatly on the earth and multiply in it.”
v.GAE: 너희는 생육하고 번성하며 땅에 가득하여 그 중에서 번성하라 하셨더라
v.KJV: And you, be ye fruitful, and multiply; bring forth abundantly in the earth, and multiply therein.
v.NASB: 'As for you, be fruitful and multiply; Populate the earth abundantly and multiply in it.'
v.NIV: As for you, be fruitful and increase in number; multiply on the earth and increase upon it.”
v.NRSV: And you, be fruitful and multiply, abound on the earth and multiply in it.”
v.SAENEW: 너희는 생육하고 번성하며 땅에 편만하여, 거기에서 번성하여라."
v.WLB: 너희는 자녀를 많이 낳아 번성하라. 땅에서 수가 불어나 땅에서 번성하라.”

v.CNV: 神告诉挪亚和与他在一起的儿子说：
v.ESV: Then God said to Noah and to his sons with him,
v.GAE: 하나님이 노아와 그와 함께 한 아들들에게 말씀하여 이르시되
v.KJV: And God spake unto Noah, and to his sons with him, saying,
v.NASB: Then God spoke to Noah and to his sons with him, saying,
v.NIV: Then God said to Noah and to his sons with him:
v.NRSV: Then God said to Noah and to his sons with him,
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 노아와 그의 아들들에게 말씀하셨다.
v.WLB: 그리고 하나님께서 노아와 그와 함께 있던 그의 아들들에게 말씀하셨습니다.

v.CNV: “看哪，我现在与你们和你们的后裔立约，
v.ESV: “Behold, I establish my covenant with you and your offspring after you,
v.GAE: 내가 내 언약을 너희와 너희 후손과
v.KJV: And I, behold, I establish my covenant with you, and with your seed after you;
v.NASB: 'Now behold, I Myself do establish My covenant with you, and with your descendants after you;
v.NIV: “I now establish my covenant with you and with your descendants after you
v.NRSV: “As for me, I am establishing my covenant with you and your descendants after you,
v.SAENEW: "이제 내가 너희와 너희 뒤에 오는 자손에게 직접 언약을 세운다.
v.WLB: “보라. 내가 너희와 너희 뒤에 올 너희의 자손과 언약을 세운다.

v.CNV: 并且与所有跟你们在一起有生命的活物立约，包括飞鸟、牲畜和所有地上的走兽，就是与从方舟里出来的立约。
v.ESV: and with every living creature that is with you, the birds, the livestock, and every beast of the earth with you, as many as came out of the ark; it is for every beast of the earth.
v.GAE: 너희와 함께 한 모든 생물 곧 너희와 함께 한 새와 가축과 땅의 모든 생물에게 세우리니 방주에서 나온 모든 것 곧 땅의 모든 짐승에게니라
v.KJV: And with every living creature that is with you, of the fowl, of the cattle, and of every beast of the earth with you; from all that go out of the ark, to every beast of the earth.
v.NASB: and with every living creature that is with you, the birds, the cattle, and every beast of the earth with you; of all that comes out of the ark, even every beast of the earth.
v.NIV: and with every living creature that was with you—the birds, the livestock and all the wild animals, all those that came out of the ark with you—every living creature on earth.
v.NRSV: and with every living creature that is with you, the birds, the domestic animals, and every animal of the earth with you, as many as came out of the ark.
v.SAENEW: 너희와 함께 있는 살아 숨쉬는 모든 생물, 곧 너와 함께 방주에서 나온 새와 집짐승과 모든 들짐승에게도, 내가 언약을 세운다.
v.WLB: 또한 너희와 함께 있던 모든 생물들, 곧 너희와 함께 있던 새와 가축과 모든 들짐승들, 방주에서 나온 땅의 모든 생물들과 언약을 세운다.

v.CNV: 我要与你们立约：凡有生命的必不再被洪水除灭，再没有洪水来毁灭大地了。”
v.ESV: I establish my covenant with you, that never again shall all flesh be cut off by the waters of the flood, and never again shall there be a flood to destroy the earth.”
v.GAE: 내가 너희와 언약을 세우리니 다시는 모든 생물을 홍수로 멸하지 아니할 것이라 땅을 멸할 홍수가 다시 있지 아니하리라
v.KJV: And I will establish my covenant with you; neither shall all flesh be cut off any more by the waters of a flood; neither shall there any more be a flood to destroy the earth.
v.NASB: 'I establish My covenant with you; and all flesh shall never again be cut off by the water of the flood, neither shall there again be a flood to destroy the earth.'
v.NIV: I establish my covenant with you: Never again will all life be destroyed by the waters of a flood; never again will there be a flood to destroy the earth. ”
v.NRSV: I establish my covenant with you, that never again shall all flesh be cut off by the waters of a flood, and never again shall there be a flood to destroy the earth.”
v.SAENEW: 내가 너희와 언약을 세울 것이니, 다시는 홍수를 일으켜서 살과 피가 있는 모든 것들을 없애는 일이 없을 것이다. 땅을 파멸시키는 홍수가 다시는 일어나지 않을 것이다."
v.WLB: 내가 너희와 언약을 세워 다시는 모든 육체가 홍수로 인해 멸절되지 않을 것이며 다시는 이 땅을 멸망시키는 홍수가 없을 것이다.”

v.CNV: 神说：“这就是我与你们，与一切跟你们同在有生命的活物所立之约的记号，直到万代；
v.ESV: And God said, “This is the sign of the covenant that I make between me and you and every living creature that is with you, for all future generations:
v.GAE: 하나님이 이르시되 내가 나와 너희와 및 너희와 함께 하는 모든 생물 사이에 대대로 영원히 세우는 언약의 증거는 이것이니라
v.KJV: And God said, This is the token of the covenant which I make between me and you and every living creature that is with you, for perpetual generations:
v.NASB: God said, 'This is the sign of the covenant which I am making between Me and you and every living creature that is with you, for all successive generations;
v.NIV: And God said, “This is the sign of the covenant I am making between me and you and every living creature with you, a covenant for all generations to come:
v.NRSV: God said, “This is the sign of the covenant that I make between me and you and every living creature that is with you, for all future generations:
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 말씀하셨다. "내가, 너희 및 너희와 함께 있는 숨쉬는 모든 생물 사이에 대대로 세우는 언약의 표는,
v.WLB: 하나님께서 말씀하셨습니다. “이것이 내가 나와 너희 사이에, 또한 너희와 함께 있는 모든 생물 사이에 대대로 영원히 세우는 내 언약의 증표다.

v.CNV: 我把天虹放在云彩中，作我与大地立约的记号。
v.ESV: I have set my bow in the cloud, and it shall be a sign of the covenant between me and the earth.
v.GAE: 내가 내 무지개를 구름 속에 두었나니 이것이 나와 세상 사이의 언약의 증거니라
v.KJV: I do set my bow in the cloud, and it shall be for a token of a covenant between me and the earth.
v.NASB: I set My bow in the cloud, and it shall be for a sign of a covenant between Me and the earth.
v.NIV: I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.
v.NRSV: I have set my bow in the clouds, and it shall be a sign of the covenant between me and the earth.
v.SAENEW: 바로 무지개이다. 내가 무지개를 구름 속에 둘 터이니, 이것이 나와 땅 사이에 세우는 언약의 표가 될 것이다.
v.WLB: 내가 구름 속에 내 무지개를 두었으니 그것이 나와 땅 사이에 세우는 언약의 표시가 될 것이다.

v.CNV: 我使云彩遮盖大地时，天虹出现云彩中，
v.ESV: When I bring clouds over the earth and the bow is seen in the clouds,
v.GAE: 내가 구름으로 땅을 덮을 때에 무지개가 구름 속에 나타나면
v.KJV: And it shall come to pass, when I bring a cloud over the earth, that the bow shall be seen in the cloud:
v.NASB: 'It shall come about, when I bring a cloud over the earth, that the bow will be seen in the cloud,
v.NIV: Whenever I bring clouds over the earth and the rainbow appears in the clouds,
v.NRSV: When I bring clouds over the earth and the bow is seen in the clouds,
v.SAENEW: 내가 구름을 일으켜서 땅을 덮을 때마다, 무지개가 구름 사이에서 나타나면,
v.WLB: 내가 땅 위에 구름을 일으켜서 그 속에 무지개가 나타날 때

v.CNV: 我就记念我与你们和一切有生命的活物所立的约：水不再成为洪水，来毁灭凡有生命的。
v.ESV: I will remember my covenant that is between me and you and every living creature of all flesh. And the waters shall never again become a flood to destroy all flesh.
v.GAE: 내가 나와 너희와 및 육체를 가진 모든 생물 사이의 내 언약을 기억하리니 다시는 물이 모든 육체를 멸하는 홍수가 되지 아니할지라
v.KJV: And I will remember my covenant, which is between me and you and every living creature of all flesh; and the waters shall no more become a flood to destroy all flesh.
v.NASB: and I will remember My covenant, which is between Me and you and every living creature of all flesh; and never again shall the water become a flood to destroy all flesh.
v.NIV: I will remember my covenant between me and you and all living creatures of every kind. Never again will the waters become a flood to destroy all life.
v.NRSV: I will remember my covenant that is between me and you and every living creature of all flesh; and the waters shall never again become a flood to destroy all flesh.
v.SAENEW: 나는, 너희와 숨쉬는 모든 짐승 곧 살과 피가 있는 모든 것과 더불어 세운 그 언약을 기억하고, 다시는 홍수를 일으켜서 살과 피가 있는 모든 것을 물로 멸하지 않겠다.
v.WLB: 내가 나와 너 사이에 그리고 모든 종류의 생물들 사이에 세운 내 언약을 기억하겠다. 물이 홍수가 돼 모든 육체를 멸망시키는 일이 다시는 없을 것이다.

v.CNV: 天虹在云彩中出现，我看见了就记念我与地上一切有生命的活物，所立的永约。”
v.ESV: When the bow is in the clouds, I will see it and remember the everlasting covenant between God and every living creature of all flesh that is on the earth.”
v.GAE: 무지개가 구름 사이에 있으리니 내가 보고 나 하나님과 모든 육체를 가진 땅의 모든 생물 사이의 영원한 언약을 기억하리라
v.KJV: And the bow shall be in the cloud; and I will look upon it, that I may remember the everlasting covenant between God and every living creature of all flesh that is upon the earth.
v.NASB: 'When the bow is in the cloud, then I will look upon it, to remember the everlasting covenant between God and every living creature of all flesh that is on the earth.'
v.NIV: Whenever the rainbow appears in the clouds, I will see it and remember the everlasting covenant between God and all living creatures of every kind on the earth.”
v.NRSV: When the bow is in the clouds, I will see it and remember the everlasting covenant between God and every living creature of all flesh that is on the earth.”
v.SAENEW: 무지개가 구름 사이에서 나타날 때마다, 내가 그것을 보고, 나 하나님이, 살아 숨쉬는 모든 것들 곧 땅 위에 있는 살과 피를 지닌 모든 것과 세운 영원한 언약을 기억하겠다."
v.WLB: 무지개가 구름 속에 나타나면 내가 그것을 보고 나 하나님과 이 땅 위의 모든 육체 사이에 세운 영원한 언약을 기억하겠다.”

v.CNV: 神对挪亚说：“这就是我与地上凡有生命的立约的记号。”
v.ESV: God said to Noah, “This is the sign of the covenant that I have established between me and all flesh that is on the earth.”
v.GAE: 하나님이 노아에게 또 이르시되 내가 나와 땅에 있는 모든 생물 사이에 세운 언약의 증거가 이것이라 하셨더라
v.KJV: And God said unto Noah, This is the token of the covenant, which I have established between me and all flesh that is upon the earth.
v.NASB: And God said to Noah, 'This is the sign of the covenant which I have established between Me and all flesh that is on the earth.'
v.NIV: So God said to Noah, “This is the sign of the covenant I have established between me and all life on the earth.”
v.NRSV: God said to Noah, “This is the sign of the covenant that I have established between me and all flesh that is on the earth.”
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 노아에게 말씀하셨다. "이것이, 내가, 땅 위의 살과 피를 지닌 모든 것과 더불어 세운 언약의 표다."
v.WLB: 하나님께서 노아에게 말씀하셨습니다. “이것이 내가 나와 이 땅 위의 모든 육체 사이에 세운 언약의 표시다.”

v.CNV: 挪亚的儿子，从方舟里出来的，就是闪、含、雅弗；含是迦南的父亲。
v.ESV: The sons of Noah who went forth from the ark were Shem, Ham, and Japheth. (Ham was the father of Canaan.)
v.GAE: 방주에서 나온 노아의 아들들은 셈과 함과 야벳이며 함은 가나안의 아버지라
v.KJV: And the sons of Noah, that went forth of the ark, were Shem, and Ham, and Japheth: and Ham is the father of Canaan.
v.NASB: Now the sons of Noah who came out of the ark were Shem and Ham and Japheth; and Ham was the father of Canaan.
v.NIV: The sons of Noah who came out of the ark were Shem, Ham and Japheth. (Ham was the father of Canaan.)
v.NRSV: The sons of Noah who went out of the ark were Shem, Ham, and Japheth. Ham was the father of Canaan.
v.SAENEW: 방주에서 나온 노아의 아들은 셈과 함과 야벳이다. 함은 가나안의 조상이 되었다.
v.WLB: 방주에서 나온 노아의 아들들은 셈, 함, 야벳인데 함은 가나안의 조상입니다.

v.CNV: 这三个人是挪亚的儿子，全地的人都是从这些人播散开来的。
v.ESV: These three were the sons of Noah, and from these the people of the whole earth were dispersed.
v.GAE: 노아의 이 세 아들로부터 사람들이 온 땅에 퍼지니라
v.KJV: These are the three sons of Noah: and of them was the whole earth overspread.
v.NASB: These three were the sons of Noah, and from these the whole earth was populated.
v.NIV: These were the three sons of Noah, and from them came the people who were scattered over the whole earth.
v.NRSV: These three were the sons of Noah; and from these the whole earth was peopled.
v.SAENEW: 이 세 사람이 노아의 아들인데, 이들에게서 인류가 나와서, 온 땅 위에 퍼져 나갔다.
v.WLB: 이 세 사람이 노아의 아들들이었고 이들로부터 온 땅에 사람들이 퍼지게 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 挪亚作起农夫来，栽种葡萄园。
v.ESV: Noah began to be a man of the soil, and he planted a vineyard.
v.GAE: 노아가 농사를 시작하여 포도나무를 심었더니
v.KJV: And Noah began to be an husbandman, and he planted a vineyard:
v.NASB: Then Noah began farming and planted a vineyard.
v.NIV: Noah, a man of the soil, proceeded to plant a vineyard.
v.NRSV: Noah, a man of the soil, was the first to plant a vineyard.
v.SAENEW: 노아는, 처음으로 밭을 가는 사람이 되어서, 포도나무를 심었다.
v.WLB: 노아가 땅을 일구기 시작해 포도원을 세웠습니다.

v.CNV: 他喝酒，喝醉了，就在帐棚里光着身子。
v.ESV: He drank of the wine and became drunk and lay uncovered in his tent.
v.GAE: 포도주를 마시고 취하여 그 장막 안에서 벌거벗은지라
v.KJV: And he drank of the wine, and was drunken; and he was uncovered within his tent.
v.NASB: He drank of the wine and became drunk, and uncovered himself inside his tent.
v.NIV: When he drank some of its wine, he became drunk and lay uncovered inside his tent.
v.NRSV: He drank some of the wine and became drunk, and he lay uncovered in his tent.
v.SAENEW: 한 번은 노아가 포도주를 마시고 취하여, 자기 장막 안에서 아무것도 덮지 않고, 벌거벗은 채로 누워 있었다.
v.WLB: 그가 포도주를 마시고 취해 자기 장막 안에서 벌거벗고 있었을 때

v.CNV: 迦南的父亲含看见了自己父亲的下体，就去告诉在外面的两个兄弟。
v.ESV: And Ham, the father of Canaan, saw the nakedness of his father and told his two brothers outside.
v.GAE: 가나안의 아버지 함이 그의 아버지의 하체를 보고 밖으로 나가서 그의 두 형제에게 알리매
v.KJV: And Ham, the father of Canaan, saw the nakedness of his father, and told his two brethren without.
v.NASB: Ham, the father of Canaan, saw the nakedness of his father, and told his two brothers outside.
v.NIV: Ham, the father of Canaan, saw his father naked and told his two brothers outside.
v.NRSV: And Ham, the father of Canaan, saw the nakedness of his father, and told his two brothers outside.
v.SAENEW: 가나안의 조상 함이 그만 자기 아버지의 벌거벗은 몸을 보았다. 그는 바깥으로 나가서, 두 형들에게 알렸다.
v.WLB: 가나안의 조상인 함이 자기 아버지가 벌거벗은 것을 보고는 밖에 있던 다른 두 형제에게 이 사실을 말했습니다.

v.CNV: 于是，闪和雅弗二人拿了件外衣，搭在自己的肩膀上，倒退着进去，盖上他们父亲的下体；因为他们背着脸，所以没有看见他们父亲的下体。
v.ESV: Then Shem and Japheth took a garment, laid it on both their shoulders, and walked backward and covered the nakedness of their father. Their faces were turned backward, and they did not see their father's nakedness.
v.GAE: 셈과 야벳이 옷을 가져다가 자기들의 어깨에 메고 뒷걸음쳐 들어가서 그들의 아버지의 하체를 덮었으며 그들이 얼굴을 돌이키고 그들의 아버지의 하체를 보지 아니하였더라
v.KJV: And Shem and Japheth took a garment, and laid it upon both their shoulders, and went backward, and covered the nakedness of their father; and their faces were backward, and they saw not their father’s nakedness.
v.NASB: But Shem and Japheth took a garment and laid it upon both their shoulders and walked backward and covered the nakedness of their father; and their faces were turned away, so that they did not see their father's nakedness.
v.NIV: But Shem and Japheth took a garment and laid it across their shoulders; then they walked in backward and covered their father’s naked body. Their faces were turned the other way so that they would not see their father naked.
v.NRSV: Then Shem and Japheth took a garment, laid it on both their shoulders, and walked backward and covered the nakedness of their father; their faces were turned away, and they did not see their father’s nakedness.
v.SAENEW: 셈과 야벳은 겉옷을 가지고 가서, 둘이서 그것을 어깨에 걸치고, 뒷걸음쳐 들어가서, 아버지의 벌거벗은 몸을 덮어 드렸다. 그들은 아버지의 벌거벗은 몸을 보지 않으려고 얼굴을 돌렸다.
v.WLB: 그러자 셈과 야벳은 겉옷을 어깨에 걸치고 뒷걸음으로 들어가서 아버지의 벌거벗은 몸을 덮어 주었습니다. 그들은 아버지가 벌거벗은 것을 보지 않으려고 얼굴을 돌렸습니다.

v.CNV: 挪亚酒醒以后，知道小儿子对他所作的事，
v.ESV: When Noah awoke from his wine and knew what his youngest son had done to him,
v.GAE: 노아가 술이 깨어 그의 작은 아들이 자기에게 행한 일을 알고
v.KJV: And Noah awoke from his wine, and knew what his younger son had done unto him.
v.NASB: When Noah awoke from his wine, he knew what his youngest son had done to him.
v.NIV: When Noah awoke from his wine and found out what his youngest son had done to him,
v.NRSV: When Noah awoke from his wine and knew what his youngest son had done to him,
v.SAENEW: 노아는 술에서 깨어난 뒤에, 작은 아들이 자기에게 한 일을 알고서,
v.WLB: 노아가 술이 깨 자기 작은 아들이 자기에게 한 일을 알게 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 就说：“迦南应当受咒诅，他必给自己的兄弟，作奴仆的奴仆。”
v.ESV: he said, “Cursed be Canaan; a servant of servants shall he be to his brothers.”
v.GAE: 이에 이르되 가나안은 저주를 받아 그의 형제의 종들의 종이 되기를 원하노라 하고
v.KJV: And he said, Cursed be Canaan; a servant of servants shall he be unto his brethren.
v.NASB: So he said, 'Cursed be Canaan; A servant of servants He shall be to his brothers.'
v.NIV: he said, “Cursed be Canaan! The lowest of slaves will he be to his brothers. ”
v.NRSV: he said, “Cursed be Canaan; lowest of slaves shall he be to his brothers.”
v.SAENEW: 이렇게 말하였다. "가나안은 저주를 받을 것이다. 가장 천한 종이 되어서, 저의 형제들을 섬길 것이다."
v.WLB: 그래서 노아는 말했습니다. “가나안은 저주를 받을 것이다. 가나안은 가장 낮고 천한 종이 돼 그의 형제들을 섬기게 될 것이다.”

v.CNV: 又说：“耶和华，闪的　神，是应当称颂的；愿迦南作他的奴仆。
v.ESV: He also said, “Blessed be the Lord , the God of Shem; and let Canaan be his servant.
v.GAE: 또 이르되 셈의 하나님 여호와를 찬송하리로다 가나안은 셈의 종이 되고
v.KJV: And he said, Blessed be the LORD God of Shem; and Canaan shall be his servant.
v.NASB: He also said, 'Blessed be the LORD, The God of Shem; And let Canaan be his servant.
v.NIV: He also said, “Praise be to the Lord , the God of Shem! May Canaan be the slave of Shem.
v.NRSV: He also said, “Blessed by the LORD my God be Shem; and let Canaan be his slave.
v.SAENEW: 그는 또 말하였다. "셈의 주 하나님은 찬양받으실 분이시다. 셈은 가나안을 종으로 부릴 것이다.
v.WLB: 그리고 노아가 다시 말했습니다. “셈의 하나님 여호와를 찬송하리니 가나안은 셈의 종이 될 것이다.

v.CNV: 愿　神使雅弗扩展，使雅弗住在闪的帐棚里；愿迦南作他的奴仆。”
v.ESV: May God enlarge Japheth, and let him dwell in the tents of Shem, and let Canaan be his servant.”
v.GAE: 하나님이 야벳을 창대하게 하사 셈의 장막에 거하게 하시고 가나안은 그의 종이 되게 하시기를 원하노라 하였더라
v.KJV: God shall enlarge Japheth, and he shall dwell in the tents of Shem; and Canaan shall be his servant.
v.NASB: 'May God enlarge Japheth, And let him dwell in the tents of Shem; And let Canaan be his servant.'
v.NIV: May God extend Japheth’s territory; may Japheth live in the tents of Shem, and may Canaan be the slave of Japheth.”
v.NRSV: May God make space for Japheth, and let him live in the tents of Shem; and let Canaan be his slave.”
v.SAENEW: 하나님이 야벳을 크게 일으키셔서, 셈의 장막에서 살게 하시고, 가나안은 종으로 삼아서, 셈을 섬기게 하실 것이다."
v.WLB: 하나님께서 야벳을 크게 일으키셔서 그가 셈의 장막에서 살게 되며 가나안은 그의 종이 되게 하실 것이다.”

v.CNV: 洪水以后，挪亚又活了三百五十年。
v.ESV: After the flood Noah lived 350 years.
v.GAE: 홍수 후에 노아가 삼백오십 년을 살았고
v.KJV: And Noah lived after the flood three hundred and fifty years.
v.NASB: Noah lived three hundred and fifty years after the flood.
v.NIV: After the flood Noah lived 350 years.
v.NRSV: After the flood Noah lived three hundred fifty years.
v.SAENEW: 홍수가 있은 뒤에도, 노아는 삼백오십 년을 더 살았다.
v.WLB: 홍수 이후 노아는 350년을 더 살았습니다.

v.CNV: 挪亚共活了九百五十岁，就死了。
v.ESV: All the days of Noah were 950 years, and he died.
v.GAE: 그의 나이가 구백오십 세가 되어 죽었더라
v.KJV: And all the days of Noah were nine hundred and fifty years: and he died.
v.NASB: So all the days of Noah were nine hundred and fifty years, and he died.
v.NIV: Noah lived a total of 950 years, and then he died.
v.NRSV: All the days of Noah were nine hundred fifty years; and he died.
v.SAENEW: 노아는 모두 구백오십 년을 살고 죽었다.
v.WLB: 노아는 모두 950년 동안 살다가 죽었습니다.
